Title: Sensor Fusion Component
Description: The ADAS system shall contain a SWC_SensorFusion component responsible for fusing radar, camera, and lidar sensor data into a unified environment model

Title: Sensor Fusion Cycle Time
Description: SWC_SensorFusion shall execute a cyclic runnable at 10ms period for sensor data fusion processing

Title: Sensor Fusion Output Interface
Description: SWC_SensorFusion shall provide fused sensor data to consuming SWCs via a Sender-Receiver interface containing FusedEnvironmentModel data element

Title: Sensor Failure Detection
Description: SWC_SensorFusion shall detect sensor communication failures and transition to degraded mode within 50ms

Title: Vehicle Control Component
Description: The ADAS system shall contain a SWC_VehicleControl component for computing vehicle control commands

Title: Vehicle Control Input
Description: SWC_VehicleControl shall receive fused environment model data from SWC_SensorFusion via R-Port

Title: Safety Monitor Component
Description: SWC_SafetyMonitor shall continuously monitor system health and can trigger emergency stop

Title: Safety Monitor Inputs
Description: SWC_SafetyMonitor shall receive sensor fusion status and vehicle control status via R-Ports
